sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6568" key="a)na/qrhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάθρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n6568.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">close observation,</tr_> Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg016.perseus-grc1:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
